item.title: Decided to go on a rant about life while on my way to Cars&Coffee, if you want more lore, memes and tism go check out the video on my YouTube! #funny #motogirl #motovlog #fyp #cars

item.title: I Will never get over how beautiful this bike sounds. I’m also getting my bike wrapped Monday 🤪🤭 she’ll be gone for 4 days :( #motorcycles #motorcycletiktok #bikersoftiktok #bikergirl #fyp #foryou #viral #fypchallenge #trending #longervideos
